title: OS Klassisch: Töne und Klänge der chinesischen Vergangenheit
further_info: Recommended Reading K. J. DeWoskin. A Song for One or Two: Music and the Concept of Art in Early China. Ann Arbor 1982; L. von Falkenhausen. Suspended Music: Chime-Bells in Culture of Bronze Age China. Berkeley 1993; G. C. Cupchik, D. Stamatopoulou & S. Duan. “Finding Elusive Resonances Across Cultures and Time.” NOAD (2021) 139–156; R. Huang, B. L. T. Sturm & A. Holzapfel. De-Centering the West: East Asian Philosophies and the Ethics of Applying Artificial Intelligence to Music. Proceedings of the 22nd ISMIR Conference (2021) 301–309.
